debug_info.goal:
m : ℕ
S : List (Call m)
hyp :
  ¬∀ c ∈ S,
      isAgentFinalCall m S c.1 c = true ∧ isAgentFinalCall m S c.2 c = true ∨
        ¬(isAgentFinalCall m S c.1 c = true ∧ isAgentFinalCall m S c.2 c = true)
⊢ False

failed_attempts:
push_neg at hyp
    rcases hyp with ⟨c, hcS, hc⟩
    exact hc (Classical.em _)

push_neg at hyp
    rcases hyp with ⟨c, hcS, hc⟩
    exact hc (Classical.em (isAgentFinalCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentFinalCall S c.snd c))

push_neg at hyp
    rcases hyp with ⟨c, hcS, hc⟩
    exact hc (em _)

push_neg at hyp
    rcases hyp with ⟨c, hcS, hc⟩
    exact hc (Classical.em _)
exact em (isAgentFinalCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentFinalCall S c.snd c)

push_neg at hyp
    rcases hyp with ⟨c, hcS, hc⟩
    exact hc (em _)

push_neg at hyp
    rcases hyp with ⟨c, hcS, hc⟩
    exact (em (isAgentFinalCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentFinalCall S c.snd c)) (hc.1) (hc.2)
successful_attempts:
have : ∀ c ∈ S,
        (isAgentFinalCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentFinalCall S c.snd c) ∨
          ¬ (isAgentFinalCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentFinalCall S c.snd c) := by
      intro c hc
      exact em _
    exact hyp this

have : ∀ c ∈ S,
        (isAgentFinalCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentFinalCall S c.snd c)
        ∨ ¬ (isAgentFinalCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentFinalCall S c.snd c) := by
      intro c hc
      exact Classical.em _
    exact hyp this

exact hyp (by
      intro c hc
      exact em _)

have : ∃ c, c ∈ S ∧
        ¬ ((isAgentFinalCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentFinalCall S c.snd c) ∨
           ¬ (isAgentFinalCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentFinalCall S c.snd c)) := by
      simpa [not_forall] using hyp
    rcases this with ⟨c, hcS, hc⟩
    exact hc (Classical.em (isAgentFinalCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentFinalCall S c.snd c))

have : ∀ c ∈ S,
        (isAgentFinalCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentFinalCall S c.snd c) ∨
          ¬(isAgentFinalCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentFinalCall S c.snd c) := by
      intro c hc
      exact em _
    exact hyp this

have : ∀ c ∈ S, (isAgentFinalCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentFinalCall S c.snd c) ∨
        ¬ (isAgentFinalCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentFinalCall S c.snd c) := by
      intro c hc
      exact em _
    exact hyp this

have : ∀ c ∈ S,
        (isAgentFinalCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentFinalCall S c.snd c)
        ∨ ¬(isAgentFinalCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentFinalCall S c.snd c) := by
      intro c hc
      exact em _
    exact hyp this

have : ∀ c ∈ S,
        isAgentFinalCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentFinalCall S c.snd c ∨
          ¬(isAgentFinalCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentFinalCall S c.snd c) := by
      intro c hc
      exact Classical.em _
    exact hyp this

have : ∀ c ∈ S,
        (isAgentFinalCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentFinalCall S c.snd c) ∨
          ¬ (isAgentFinalCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentFinalCall S c.snd c) := by
      intro c hc
      exact Classical.em _
    exact hyp this

have : ∃ c ∈ S,
        ¬ ((isAgentFinalCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentFinalCall S c.snd c)
          ∨ ¬ (isAgentFinalCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentFinalCall S c.snd c)) := by
      simpa [not_forall] using hyp
    rcases this with ⟨c, hcS, hc⟩
    exact hc (Classical.em _)

have : ∀ c ∈ S,
        (isAgentFinalCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentFinalCall S c.snd c)
        ∨ ¬ (isAgentFinalCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentFinalCall S c.snd c) := by
      intro c hc
      exact em _
    exact hyp this

have h := Classical.not_forall.mp hyp
    rcases h with ⟨c, hc⟩
    have hc' := Classical.not_imp.mp hc
    rcases hc' with ⟨hcS, hnot⟩
    exact hnot (Classical.em (isAgentFinalCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentFinalCall S c.snd c))

have := Classical.not_forall.mp hyp
    rcases this with ⟨c, hc⟩
    have := Classical.not_forall.mp hc
    rcases this with ⟨hcS, hnot⟩
    have : (isAgentFinalCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentFinalCall S c.snd c) ∨
        ¬(isAgentFinalCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentFinalCall S c.snd c) := by
      exact Classical.em _
    exact hnot this

have : ∀ c ∈ S,
        (isAgentFinalCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentFinalCall S c.snd c) ∨
          ¬ (isAgentFinalCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentFinalCall S c.snd c) := by
      intro c hc
      exact em _
    exact hyp this

have : ∀ c ∈ S,
        (isAgentFinalCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentFinalCall S c.snd c) ∨
          ¬ (isAgentFinalCall S c.fst c ∧ isAgentFinalCall S c.snd c) := by
      intro c hc
      exact em _
    exact hyp this
